title: Add wrap-up phase with configurable review steps
description:
Implement Phase 3: wrap-up, which runs after implementation completes.

Components:
1. Wrap-up config parser - reads wrap_up section from .tick/config.yaml
   - run: shell command (with name and continue_on_failure)
   - review: boolean (Claude reviews the full diff)
   - pr: draft (create draft PR)

2. Review step runner - executes each step in the worktree directory
   - Shell commands via exec.Command with workDir set
   - Claude review: spawn agent with diff as prompt
   - Report failures but continue if continue_on_failure is set

3. Run report generator - produces markdown summary
   - Tasks completed/pending/awaiting with cost per task
   - Files changed (from git diff --stat against parent branch)
   - Total metrics (cost, tokens, duration, waves)

4. Merge-or-preserve logic
   - If all tasks closed: merge worktree branch to parent, cleanup
   - If --no-merge: skip merge, print branch name
   - If tasks remain: preserve worktree, print path
   - If --pr: create draft PR via gh cli with run report as body

5. Default behavior (no config): commit all changes, print summary

New file: internal/wrapup/wrapup.go (or similar)
acceptance_criteria: Wrap-up phase runs after implementation. Shell review steps execute in worktree. Run report generates correct markdown. Merge/preserve works based on task state. --pr creates draft PR. Default behavior works without config. Tests cover: config parsing, report generation, merge success, merge conflict preservation.
closed_reason: Wrap-up phase implemented with configurable review steps, report generation, and merge/PR support.
